steps.title: Resolve the quasar paradox
steps.content: The passage presents a contradiction: about 200 quasars formed within the universe's first billion years, yet early-universe conditions are believed to have been poorly suited to quasar creation. The conclusion should account for that mismatch.

steps.title: Reject unsupported comparisons
steps.content: Choice A invents a luminosity comparison, and Choice C invents a mass comparison. Choice B focuses on 3C 273 even though the paradox concerns early quasars generally. The remaining conclusion says the current understanding may be incomplete. The answer is D.
